name: Curtain Call Cloak
description:
This blue velvet cloak is cut from the remains of a curtain from a destroyed theater. When worn, you gain a +2 item bonus to Performance checks while acting, orating, or singing, as the cloak makes minor motions to accentuate your performance.

Activate 2 Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You take a bow, spread your arms, and the cloak casts 4th-rank centered on a corner of your space. This darkness doesn't impede your vision. While the darkness persists, it emits noise like the applauding of a moderately sized crowd.
